surfaces.input_bar: bg-zinc-950/80 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] rounded-2xl
surfaces.user_message: bg-zinc-900 border border-white/5 rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-5 py-3
surfaces.tool_card: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-4 hover:bg-zinc-900 transition-colors shadow-sm

icons.style: Use 'Duotone' or 'Regular' weight for a premium, intricate tech feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Setup Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono in the CSS/Tailwind config.
Implement the floating multimodal input bar using glassmorphism (Crystal Glass rule). It must be fixed at the bottom, centered with max-w-3xl.
Message list must have generous spacing (gap-6 or gap-8).
Assistant messages MUST NOT be in bubbles. Render markdown cleanly with full-bleed typography and distinct syntax highlighting for code blocks.
User messages should use the 'user_message' surface.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='chat-input', data-testid='send-button', data-testid='sidebar-new-chat').
Vault Mode and Warning cards must strictly use the predefined accent colors (vault_green and warning_amber).
Use Framer Motion for smooth entrances (messages, tool cards, artifact panel slide-in).
